info.title: Rewrite API
info.summary: Project-level API reference for Rewrite v1.
info.description:
Reference for the externally supported API-key-accessible endpoints in Rewrite API v1.

All successful responses use the `ok` / `data` envelope. Paginated list endpoints return `cursor` at the top level.

tags.name: Messages
tags.description: Send, read and manage SMS messages.

post.description: Send one SMS with inline content or by rendering a saved template. This route accepts Brazilian destination numbers in `+55` format and returns the accepted message ID immediately. Requires API key scope `message:write`.

x-codeSamples.label: Node.js

get.description: List accepted messages for the current project. Results are returned in reverse chronological order with a top-level cursor for pagination. Requires API key scope `message:read`.

x-codeSamples.label: Node.js

post.description: Send between 1 and 100 SMS messages in one request. This route accepts Brazilian destination numbers in `+55` format and returns only the accepted message IDs. Requires API key scope `message:write`.

x-codeSamples.label: Node.js

post.description: Cancel a queued or scheduled message before it reaches the provider. Requires API key scope `message:write`.

x-codeSamples.label: Node.js

get.description: Fetch the current state of a single message, including delivery timestamps and rendered content. Requires API key scope `message:read`.

x-codeSamples.label: Node.js

bearerAuth.description: Send your project API key as `Authorization: Bearer rw_...`.

IdempotencyKey.name: Idempotency-Key
IdempotencyKey.description: Optional key used to safely retry the same create request without creating duplicates.

After.name: after
After.description: Cursor for forward pagination. Send exactly one of `after` or `before` when paginating.

Before.name: before
Before.description: Cursor for backward pagination. Send exactly one of `after` or `before` when paginating.

Limit.name: limit
Limit.description: Page size. Backend cursor schemas validate this between `2` and the route-specific maximum.

WithI18n.name: withi18n
WithI18n.description: When `true`, include the template `i18n` map in list/detail responses.

CountryCode.name: country
CountryCode.description: Lowercase ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code inferred from the destination number.

WebhookEventTypeRequired.name: type
WebhookEventTypeRequired.description: Webhook event type to include in the result set.

WebhookDeliveryStatusRequired.name: status
WebhookDeliveryStatusRequired.description: Delivery status to include in the result set.

TooManyRequests.description: Rate limited. The backend sends `X-RateLimit-Limit`, `X-RateLimit-Remaining`, `X-RateLimit-Retry-After` and `X-RateLimit-Retry-Policy`. `X-RateLimit-Retry-After` is returned in milliseconds.

persist.description: When `true`, another page is available using the returned cursor values.

after.description: Cursor to request the next page.

before.description: Cursor to request the previous page.

name.description: Tag key attached to the message.

value.description: Tag value attached to the message.

characters.description: Total character count in the rendered SMS content.

encoding.description: Encoding detected for the rendered SMS content.

concat.description: Maximum characters allowed per segment in multipart SMS.

count.description: Number of SMS segments required to send the message.

reason.description: Why Rewrite selected the reported segmentation result.

single.description: Maximum characters allowed when the message fits in a single SMS.

max.description: Maximum number of SMS segments Rewrite is allowed to send.

mode.description: How Rewrite should behave when the message exceeds the allowed segment count.

smart.description: When `true`, Rewrite may optimize the content to fit GSM-7 when possible.

tags.description: Optional metadata stored with the message.

scheduledAt.description: When provided, Rewrite schedules the message for later delivery.

segmentation.description: Optional segmentation rules for long SMS bodies.

templateId.description: Template identifier to render before sending.

variables.description: Variable values used when rendering the selected template.

tags.description: Optional metadata stored with the message.

scheduledAt.description: When provided, Rewrite schedules the message for later delivery.

segmentation.description: Optional segmentation rules for the rendered template output.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when Rewrite accepted the message.

analysis.description: Segmentation analysis for the SMS content accepted by Rewrite.

ids.description: Identifiers for the messages accepted into the batch request.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when Rewrite accepted the message.

from.description: Resolved sender ID used for this message, when available.

status.description: Latest delivery status known by Rewrite.

country.description: Country inferred from the destination number.

content.description: Final SMS content sent to the destination number.

encoding.description: Encoding used by the provider when sending the SMS.

templateId.description: Template used to render the message, when applicable.

deliveredAt.description: Timestamp when the provider confirmed final delivery.

scheduledAt.description: Scheduled send time, when the message was delayed intentionally.

isPayAsYouGo.description: Whether the message consumed pay-as-you-go balance instead of subscription quota.

to.description: Destination number that should receive the OTP.

prefix.description: Short brand prefix included in the OTP SMS.

to.description: Destination number used for the OTP.

prefix.description: Brand prefix included in the OTP SMS.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when Rewrite accepted the OTP request.

expiresAt.description: Timestamp when the OTP becomes invalid.

to.description: Destination number used when the OTP was created.

code.description: Numeric OTP code provided by the user.

valid.description: Always `true` when the OTP verification succeeds.

verifiedAt.description: Timestamp when Rewrite marked the OTP as verified.

name.description: Variable placeholder name used inside the template content.

fallback.description: Fallback value used when the variable is omitted at send time.

TemplateI18n.description: Locale overrides keyed by lowercase ISO country code, for example `br`.

name.description: Template name used later in the dashboard and API responses.

i18n.description: Locale-specific overrides for the template content.

content.description: Default SMS content rendered when no locale override applies.

description.description: Short human-readable explanation of what the template is for.
description.example: Template usado no fluxo de login

i18n.description: Locale-specific overrides to replace on the template.

variables.description: Updated variable definitions for the template.

description.description: Updated human-readable description for the template.
description.example: Template usado no fluxo de recuperacao de conta

content.description: Default SMS content stored for the template.

i18n.description: Locale-specific overrides available for the template.

variables.description: Variable definitions accepted by the template.

description.description: Human-readable description saved with the template.
description.example: Template usado no fluxo de login

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the template was created.
Timestamp when the template was created.

name.description: Friendly name shown in the dashboard and logs.

events.description: Event types that should be delivered to this endpoint.

secret.description: Accepted formats: `whsec_<base64>`, raw base64, or legacy `rw_whsec_...`.

endpoint.description: Must be HTTPS in production. `http://localhost/...` is also accepted. Query strings and fragments are rejected.

name.description: Updated friendly name. Send `null` to remove the current name.

events.description: Updated event selection for the webhook endpoint.

secret.description: New signing secret to use for future deliveries.

endpoint.description: Updated destination URL for future deliveries.

status.description: Whether Rewrite should actively deliver events to this endpoint.

name.description: Friendly name shown in the dashboard and logs.

status.description: Current lifecycle status of the webhook endpoint.

endpoint.description: Destination URL that receives Rewrite webhook events.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the webhook endpoint was created.

secret.description: Signing secret associated with the webhook endpoint.
Generated signing secret to persist on your side.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the webhook endpoint was created.

prefix.description: Brand prefix embedded in the OTP SMS.

expiresAt.description: Timestamp when the OTP becomes invalid.

id.description: Message identifier that triggered the webhook.

projectId.description: Project identifier associated with the event.

type.description: Message type associated with the event.

status.description: Delivery status reported in the event.

content.description: Rendered SMS content included in the event payload.

country.description: Country inferred from the destination number.

analysis.description: Segmentation analysis for the message content.

code.description: Provider or internal code associated with the delivery failure.

deliveredAt.description: Timestamp when the provider confirmed delivery.

templateId.description: Template identifier used to render the message, when applicable.

otp.description: OTP metadata present only for `sms.otp` events.

projectId.description: Project identifier associated with the batch event.

ids.description: Accepted message identifiers that belong to the batch.

id.description: Webhook event identifier generated by Rewrite.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when Rewrite created the event payload.

data.description: Event payload for either a single message or a batch.

url.description: Endpoint URL that received the delivery attempt.

type.description: Webhook event type delivered in this attempt.

code.description: HTTP status code returned by the destination endpoint.

error.description: Transport or application error captured for the attempt.

retryAt.description: Next scheduled retry time, when the attempt failed and will retry.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when Rewrite recorded the delivery attempt.

messageId.description: Message identifier associated with the delivery attempt, when available.

payload.description: Event payload delivered during this attempt.

webhookId.description: Webhook identifier associated with the log entry.
